race.comment: MOYASSR (2) has been making big strides on the Dundalk all-weather track this winter taking home three wins and two placings. Fifth there beaten 2.75L last time and fresh from a short break it is hard to ignore the better handicap received tackling turf. ELECTRIC NIGHT (12) remains firmly unexposed after only four attempts and makes first start here on grass. Fourth in latest on handicap debut (1400m). Interesting. LADY ARWEN (6) bounced back with a short-head victory last time. Not unduly punished by the handicapper. Could go well. MEDIEVAL NIGHT (2) remains of interest now with a new yard. Positive he went well fresh last campaign.
